body.title: day-close: create GitHub Issues for tickets missing github_issue
body.result: push-queue command in github_sync.py creates GH Issues for all non-done tickets missing github_issue; writes numbers back via set-github-issue. Created 35 issues (#344-#378). day-close Step 6 added.
body.description: In /day-close, for each cc_queue ticket missing github_issue field, create a GitHub Issue (title = slug + title) via gh CLI and write the issue number back to the ticket. Cloud backup for local queue.
